わぁ～！ 綺麗なお魚さんたちが展示されてるよ！<br>元気に泳いでて、見てて楽し:
Wow! The beautiful fish are on display! They're swimming so
energetically! It's fun to watch!
でも、お魚の観察はお静かにだよ司令官君。<br>大きな声で話すとビックリさせちゃ:
But you have to be quiet when observing the fish, Commander. If you
talk too loud, you'll startle them.
――あっ！ 見て見て、司令官君！ あそこ泳いでるお魚！<br>あれは、すごく綺麗:
Ah! Look, look, Commander! That fish swimming over there! That's a
very rare fish that can only live in very clean freshwater!
しかもしかも、産卵のために一度ペアを組んだ雄と雌は一生添い遂げるって<br>珍し:
What's more, the male and female that pair up for spawning stay
together for life! That's such a rare trait! Isn't that romantic?
え？ 大きな声で喋りすぎ……？ あ、あははは……お魚のこととなると<br>ついテ:
Huh? Was I talking too loud...? Ah, ahaha... When it comes to fish, I
just get so carried away... S-sorry.
